summary.description:
Today, cooler for the feels like temperature (down 3.5°C) and outside temperature (down 2.8°C), more moisture-laden outside humidity (up 6%), and drier conditions in rainfall (down 0.6 mm).

Compared to today, yesterday also had noticeable differences in light levels (up 7409 lux) and cloud levels (up 516 m).

The past week and month had observable variation in cloud levels (up 1447 m), light levels (up 9613 lux), feels like temperature (up 4.4°C), and outside temperature (up 3.6°C) when compared to today.

Today’s cloud levels is 515.6m lower than yesterday, 1076.2m lower than past week, 1447.1m lower than past month.

The cloud levels measurements for yesterday ranged from 860m to 3110m and averaged 1357.8m, while the past week and month indicated warmer conditions.
cloud levels.summary: The clouds will be high, plenty of sunshine is expected.

summary.summary: Inside; temperatures should be quite comfortable. Outside; warm but comfortable temperatures are expected. Also, air will feel comfortable and balanced. Possible light showers, the clouds will be high, plenty of sunshine is expected, and bright intervals likely. Changeable conditions.
